libraryDescription:
The data.WrappedQueue library provides a queue-type data structure.

This module provides the generic struct WrappedQueue,which stores queue data,and generic functions such as enqueue and dequeuefor adding and removing data from it.

In data.WrappedQueue, elements are implemented as values wrapped and storedin the DataWrapper struct.
Therefore, unlike data.Queue,WrappedQueue can handle arrays as elements.

On the other hand, because adding and removing elements involves wrapping theminto the DataWrapper struct, processing becomes heavier than in Queue by that overhead.
Therefore, if the elements are not arrays,using Queue is recommended rather than WrappedQueue.

struct0.name: WrappedQueue<Type>
struct0.description: The queue struct. It stores queue data.

function0.name: clear<Type>
function0.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.

function1.name: size<Type>
function1.description: Returns the size currently in use.
function1.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.

function2.name: enqueue<Type>
function2.description: Adds an element to the queue.
function2.parameters:
(WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct. 
(Type type) value : The element to be added.

function3.name: dequeue<Type>
function3.description: Removes and returns an element from the queue. The extracted element is deleted from the queue.
function3.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.

function4.name: peek<Type>
function4.description: Returns an element from the queue without removing it.
function4.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.

function5.name: contains<Type>
function5.description: Determines whether the queue contains the specified element.
function5.parameters:
(WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct. 
(Type type) element : The element whose presence is to be checked.

function6.name: reverse<Type>
function6.description: Reverses the order of all elements held by the queue.
function6.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.

function7.name: toDataWrapperArray<Type>
function7.description: Converts all elements held by the queue into a DataWrapper array and returns it.
function7.parameters: (WrappedQueue<Type> type) queue : The target queue struct.
function7.returnValue: (DataWrapper<Type>[] type) A DataWrapper array containing all elements of the queue.
